Test Case Title: Verify search functionality using employee name (Autocomplete hint)
Pre-conditions: user is on employee list page
Test Steps:
1- enter the first few letters of an existing employee's name in 'Employee Name' field.
2- select the full name from the dropdown hint.
3- click search button.
Test Data: employee name: Ahm -> select Ahmed Farag
Expected Result: The system filters the table and displays only the record matching the selected employee name.

Test Case Title: Verify behavior system when combining search using multiple filters at once

Test Steps:

2- select a job title.
3- select a sub unit.
4- click search button.
Test Data:
Name: Ahmed Farag
Job Title: QA Engineer
Sub Unit: IT
Expected Result: The system filters the table and displays only the records matching the selected options.

Test Case Title: Verify that clicking 'Reset' clears all search filters and restores default view
Pre-conditions: user is on employee list page
Test Steps:
1- fill out multiple filters (Name, ID, Job Title).
2- click reset button.
Expected Result: All search input fields are cleared.
